SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: TORRES, FRANCISCO G. SUBSTITUTED FOR FORD, BILL AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRIS, JAMES NORRIS, VIRGINIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 ELLIS STREET, #1D, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
